creator: jacob@whotookspaz.org
text:
Ahh I did not test this. All apologies I omitted this. I don't think 
there's a way to fix this unfortunately, and upstream has been less than 
cooperative when it comes to FreeBSD in the past (not to mention the 
head devs of the project don't really like me very much =/ but that's 
their problem). If anyone else can find a fix, then please let me know 
(Patches Welcome(TM)). In the meantime, committer: can you add an 
additional note to UPDATING that the usual upgrade procedure will not 
work and the port must be deinstalled prior to build? Thanks.
